meta.scope: 영상 위젯 모듈 조립용 신규 도메인 부품 3개 (parts2). part1 세트는 node-map.json 참조.
meta.notes: Pretendard fonts loaded directly (Regular). All text bound to canonical text styles via setTextStyleIdAsync (body/12R, body/10R). All fills/strokes bound to Variables; provisional foundation colors limited to type dots + chart data marks (documented in set descriptions). Section boundary stroke removed as decorative chrome (rawHex 0).

section.name: Video Parts 2
section.placement: clear space right of 'Video Widgets' section (1020:2 spans 0..2150); no overlap

componentSets.name: Video/Type3 Block
componentSets.structure: 각 유형 item = [색점(6x6) + 유형 라벨 + 값 placeholder]. Column=세로 3행(dot+label+FILL+value), Row=가로 3열(dot+label 위, value 아래).

componentSets.name: Video/Video Tile
componentSets.structure: 타일 컨테이너(200x112.5, 16:9, radius8, clipsContent) = 영상영역(base/black) + 좌상단 라벨 뱃지(x8,y8, bg level-3, radius4, 텍스트).

bindings.videoArea: base/black (VariableID:8:711) — 영상 피드 의도적 흑색, Variable 바인딩(마커 불필요)

componentSets.name: Video/Chart
componentSets.structure: VERTICAL [ plotRow(HORIZONTAL: Y눈금 라벨 + plot 200x100), X눈금 라벨 row ]. plot = Y축선 + X축선 + 데이터마크. 데이터는 예시.

structureNotes.combineAsVariants: 3 sets combined via combineAsVariants(currentPage) then set to auto-layout (Type3=VERTICAL, Tile/Chart=HORIZONTAL) with padding16+itemSpacing so variants pack compactly. No packing collapse (widest set Chart 560px).
structureNotes.detach: None — no cyclic self-containment (no variant embeds a sibling variant instance).
structureNotes.rename: Variant components renamed to Prop=Value before combine; sets named Video/{Name} slash-folder (matches existing Video/ convention).
structureNotes.remap: N/A — all sets newly created (no pre-existing instances).
structureNotes.placement: New Section 'Video Parts 2' at x=2400 (right of Video Widgets section), 3 sets stacked vertically inside.
structureNotes.sectionStroke: removed (strokes=[]) as decorative section-boundary chrome; section fill bound to bg/level-1.

provisionalColors: Type3 Block 유형 구분점 3색 (blue/green/orange-dark/350) — 확정 유형색 체계 미정
Chart 데이터 선/막대 (blue-dark/350) — 확정 데이터 시리즈 색 미정

selfCheck.overlap: none (metadata-verified child bounds within each set)
selfCheck.renderScreenshots: section overview + Type3 close + Tile close — dots colored, labels/placeholders present, tiles black + badges (Alert red), charts render (polyline + 5 bars + axes + ticks). No clipping.
